translations.***⚠️⚠️⚠️ 請注意，如果 Google Apps Script 程式碼有: ***⚠️⚠️⚠️ Please note, if you make changes to the Google Apps Script code, you must click Deploy -> Manage Deployments -> Select Create New Version for the changes to take effect. For details, refer to the article above.***

translations.***⚠️⚠️⚠️️*** *如果你的 Response 為空 `{ \"ok\: ***⚠️⚠️⚠️️*** *If your Response is empty `{ "ok": true, "result": [] }`, please try sending a message (e.g. `Hello`) in your Group and then call the API again. It should work.*
translations.*Google Apps Script 網頁應用程式部署、更新、使用、除錯可參考: *For deploying, updating, using, and debugging Google Apps Script web applications, please refer to my previous article "[**Automating Google Services with Google Apps Script RPA**](../f6713ba3fee3/)".*
translations.*LINE Notify自2016年9月推出以來，一直致力於為開發者提供服務。為: *Since its launch in September 2016, LINE Notify has been dedicated to serving developers. To provide better service and focus resources on similar future products, we have decided to end this service on March 31, 2025. We sincerely thank all users who have supported and used LINE as a notification integration service over the years.*
translations.*你可以依據實際需求創建不同的 Group & 依照步驟加入、設定機器人。*\n: *You can create different groups based on your actual needs and follow the steps to add and configure the bot.*
translations.*感謝您長期以來使用LINE Notify。*\n\n: *Thank you for using LINE Notify for a long time.*
translations.*我希望不同的個人通知類型傳到不同的 Group，這 **邊因為 Demo 只創: *I want different types of personal notifications to be sent to different Groups, but **here only one My Notify Group is created for the demo**.*
translations.*本文以 [Goolge Apps Script](https://script: *This article uses [Google Apps Script](https://script.google.com/home){:target="_blank"} as an example. For a detailed introduction to Google Apps Script, please refer to my previous article “[**Automating Google Services RPA with Google Apps Script**](../f6713ba3fee3/)”.*
translations.*若您仍需使用LINE向用戶傳送通知的商品服務，建議可改用功能更豐富的Messa: *If you still need to send notifications to users via LINE, it is recommended to switch to the more feature-rich Messaging API.*
translations.- Add a new deployment task and select \:
- Add a new deployment task and select "Grant access"

- A pop-up window will appear; select your Google login account.

- A warning window will pop up. Select "Advanced" -> "Go to `project name` (unsafe)"

- Select "Allow"
translations.- Go to the Google Apps Script homepage\:
- Go to the Google Apps Script homepage

- Click "Create New Project" at the top left

- Click "Untitled Project" and enter the project name, e.g. `Telegram`

- Paste the basic code:

translations.- Slack: The free version only keeps mes:
- Slack: The free version only stores messages for 30 days. Since my notifications are mostly personal, using Slack feels like overkill. (For sending messages with Slack, you can refer to my previous article: [Slack & ChatGPT Integration](../bd94cc88f9c9/) )

- Discord: My notifications are more personal, so it's a bit overkill.

- **Telegram: Free and Almost Unlimited Use.**
translations.- The Telegram API format is `https://ap:
- The Telegram API format is `https://api.telegram.org/bot` **your_BOT_API_Token** `/getUpdates`. The BOT API Token string must be prefixed with the `bot` string.

- Example: `curl 'https://api.telegram.org/bot7814194578:AAEWpPJvKn06ID7D9FjV65aDKQLkGkz8cc8/getUpdates'`
translations.- Top right corner \"Deploy\" -> \"New d:
- Top right corner "Deploy" -> "New deployment"

- Top-left corner "Settings" -> "Web App"

- Who can access: Select "Everyone"
translations.- Verification successful! Notifications:
- Verification successful! Notifications are correctly sent to the Telegram Group when someone stars my Repo! 🎉🎉🎉

- You can refer to my previous article "[Using Google Apps Script to Create a Free Github Repo Star Notifier in Three Steps](../382218e15697/)" for the setup process.
translations.- We will respond based on different Cha:
- We will respond based on different Chat IDs, so the bot can reply in both 1:1 chats and group chats where the bot is present.

- Success 🎉🎉🎉

translations.- `telegramToken` = `your_BOT_API_Token`:
- `telegramToken` = `your_BOT_API_Token`

- In the above demo code, when receiving a POST request with the Command parameter equal to `/update`, it responds with `Hello…` to simulate handling the command and replying.

- `telegramToken` = `your_BOT_API_Token`

- `TelegramChatId` here is a custom method I defined myself because, in practice, I want different notifications sent to different groups. Therefore, I created a structure to manage target groups and their `Group Chat Id`.
translations.- text: Message content (required)\n\n-:
- text: Message content (required)

- chat_id: Target Group Chat Id (required)

- parse_mode: The message content parsing mode, here I specify `Markdown`

- disable_web_page_preview: Whether to disable link previews in the message content. Setting this to `true` disables previews, making the message display cleaner.
translations.- ✅ When someone stars the repo, a webho:
- ✅ When someone stars the repo, a webhook triggers -> Google Apps Script -> Telegram Bot sends a notification to the Telegram — Github Stats Group

- ✅ Google Apps Script daily schedule -> fetch Github Repo Stats -> Telegram Bot sends notification to Telegram — Github Stats Group

- ✅ Use the `/update` Telegram Bot Command to trigger fetching Github Repo Stats status -> Telegram Bot sends notification to Telegram — Github Stats Group
translations.- ❌ All messages cannot be categorized o:
- ❌ All messages cannot be categorized or grouped and are sent to Line Notify.

- ❌ Cannot set special options for individual messages (such as notification sound, mute, etc.)

- ❌ Unable to input message interaction
translations.1. New Group\n\n2. Search for your bot a:
1. New Group

2. Search for your bot account & click Join

3. Set Group Name and Avatar
translations.1. Open and join the [BotFather bot](htt:
1. Open and join the [BotFather bot](https://t.me/BotFather){:target="_blank"}

2. After joining, send the message `/newbot` to create your bot.

3. Enter your bot name.

4. Enter your bot username (must be unique and end with `bot`, for example, my `zhgchgli_bot`).

5. Your Bot link, click to start using (e.g. t.me/harrytest56_bot).

6. Get your `YOUR_BOT_API_Token`, **please keep it safe** ⚠️⚠️⚠️

translations.Discord：我的通知比較是個人，一樣有點大材小用。\n: Discord: My notifications are more personal, so it's a bit overkill.
translations.Line Notify 的優點是非常容易串接，拿來做個人通知機器人非常方便好用，: The advantage of Line Notify is its ease of integration, making it very convenient for personal notification bots. Some Line Bots or third-party services also use Line Notify for notifications (e.g., Louisa, your order notification feature). However, it has several drawbacks, such as limited message content, no group segmentation (all messages are sent to the same Line Notify Bot), and message length restrictions.
translations.Slack：免費版訊息只保留 30 天、我的通知比較是個人，用 Slack 有點: Slack: The free version only keeps messages for 30 days. Since my notifications are mostly personal, using Slack feels like overkill. (For sending messages with Slack, you can refer to my previous article: [Slack & ChatGPT Integration](../bd94cc88f9c9/) )
translations.Telegram API 格式為 `https://api.telegram.o: The Telegram API format is `https://api.telegram.org/bot` **your_BOT_API_Token** `/getUpdates`. The BOT API Token string must be prefixed with the `bot` string.
translations.Telegram Bot API 沒有直接取得 Group 列表、Group C: Telegram Bot API does not provide an endpoint to directly get the list of Groups or Group Chat IDs. You can only obtain them by using `/getUpdates` to fetch the bot's message list and find the Group Chat ID from there:
translations.Telegram Bot Command 就能讓我直接輸入指令訊息，命令機器人立: Telegram Bot Command allows me to directly enter command messages, making the bot immediately perform the actions I want.
translations.Telegram Bot 的申請非常簡單，連網頁都不需要開，只要跟官方的 [Bo: Applying for a Telegram Bot is very simple; you don't even need to open a webpage. Just interact with the official [BotFather bot](https://t.me/BotFather){:target="_blank"}.
translations.[**API 參數可參考官方文件**](https://core.telegra: [**API parameters can be found in the official documentation**](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#sendmessage){:target="_blank"}

translations.[安裝、註冊好 Telegram 服務](https://telegram.or: After installing and registering for the Telegram service, click to add [BotFather bot](https://t.me/BotFather){:target="_blank"} as a friend.
translations.[簡單 3 步驟 — 打造免費 GA4 自動數據通知機器人](../1e85b8: [Simple 3 Steps — Create a Free GA4 Automated Data Notification Bot](../1e85b8df2348/)
translations.`/sendMessage` [**API 參數，更多參數、細節可參考官方文件*: `/sendMessage` [**API parameters, for more parameters and details refer to the official documentation**](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#sendmessage){:target="_blank"}, below are the parameters I commonly use:
translations.`TelegramChatId` 這邊是我自己多定義的方法，因為實務上我希望不同: `TelegramChatId` here is a custom method I defined myself because, in practice, I want different notifications sent to different groups. Therefore, I created a structure to manage target groups and their `Group Chat Id`.
translations.```scss\nsendNotifyMessage(\"Hello\", Te:
```scss
sendNotifyMessage("Hello", TelegramChatId.MEDIUM) // Send Hello message to MEDIUM Group Chat Id
sendNotifyMessage("Hello", -1234) // Send Hello message to -1234 Group Chat Id
```
translations.disable_web_page_preview: 訊息內容的連結是否不要預覽，: disable_web_page_preview: Whether to disable link previews in the message content. Setting this to `true` turns off previews, making the message display cleaner.
translations.parse_mode: 訊息內容解析方式，這邊我指定 `Markdown`\n: parse_mode: The message content parsing mode, here I specify `Markdown`
translations.✅ Google Apps Script 每日定時 -> 撈取 Github R: ✅ Google Apps Script daily schedule -> fetch Github Repo Stats -> Telegram Bot sends notification to Telegram — Github Stats Group
translations.✅ 使用 `/update` Telegram Bot Command 觸發撈取: ✅ Use the `/update` Telegram Bot Command to trigger fetching Github Repo Stats status -> Telegram Bot sends notification to Telegram — Github Stats Group
translations.✅ 有人按 Repo 星星時會觸發 Webhook -> Google Apps: ✅ When someone stars the repo, a webhook triggers -> Google Apps Script -> Telegram Bot sends a notification to the Telegram — Github Stats Group
translations.❌ 所有訊息無法分類、分群組都傳到 Line Notify\n: ❌ All messages cannot be categorized or grouped and are sent to Line Notify.
translations.❌ 無法針對個別訊息做特殊設定 (如通知聲、靜音…)\n: ❌ Cannot set special options for individual messages (such as notification sound, mute, etc.)
translations.上述 Demo 程式我們在收到 Post 請求、Command 參數等於 `/u: In the above demo code, when receiving a POST request with the Command parameter equal to `/update`, it responds with `你好…` to simulate handling the command and replying.
translations.以我的 [Github Repo Star Notifier 機器人](../3: Using my [Github Repo Star Notifier Bot](../382218e15697/) as an example:
translations.你的 Bot 連結，點進進入開始使用 (e.g. t.me/harrytest5: Your Bot link, click to start using (e.g. t.me/harrytest56_bot)
translations.使用 Telegram API `/setWebhook` 註冊你的 Webho: Use the Telegram API `/setWebhook` to register your Webhook URL.
translations.先上最終效果圖(以 [Github Star 通知、Repo Stats 通知為: First, here is the final result image (using [Github Star notification and Repo Stats notification as examples](../382218e15697/)):
translations.前往 Google Apps Script 首頁\n: Go to the Google Apps Script homepage
translations.加入後直接傳送訊息「 `/newbot` 」建立你的機器人。\n: After joining, send the message `/newbot` to create your bot.
translations.可以從回應中找到對應 Group Name + type=group 的巢狀 J: You can find the nested JSON data with the corresponding Group Name + type=group in the response, where the id is the Group Chat ID:
translations.可以看到非常簡單方便好用…\n\n: You can see it is very simple, convenient, and easy to use…
translations.回 Telegram Group 就會出現剛發送的訊息內容。\n: Replying in the Telegram Group will display the message content that was just sent.
translations.回到我的使用場景，我的機器人會定時或是 Webhook 觸發傳送通知訊息送給我；: Back to my use case, my bot sends notification messages to me either on a schedule or triggered by a webhook; but sometimes I also want to manually trigger the bot to get the current result immediately. Previously, Line Notify didn’t have this feature. Using Google Apps Script, the only option was to crudely set up a URL that triggers the bot whenever opened, which is not very user-friendly.
translations.對我來說 Telegram 的通訊服務比較符合我原本 Line Notify 的: For me, Telegram's messaging service better fits my original Line Notify usage needs. I need a channel that can receive notifications, preferably with different channels for different needs. The more diverse the acceptable content and formats, the better, and it should be quick and easy to integrate. Telegram meets all these requirements and also supports interactive features with the Bot.
translations.我們可以使用 `/sendMessage` 發送訊息到 Group。\n\n: We can use `/sendMessage` to send messages to a Group.
translations.我們會根據不同的 Chat Id 回應，因此不管是 1:1 對機器人或是有機器人: We will respond based on different Chat IDs, so the bot can reply in both 1:1 chats and group chats where the bot is present.
translations.我的個人通知機器人服務是使用 Google Apps Script 達成的，因此: My personal notification bot service is implemented using Google Apps Script, so the conversion example is based on Google Apps Script (similar to JavaScript).
translations.手把手將 Line Notify 個人通知服務遷移至同樣免費、更強大的 Tele: Step-by-step Guide to Migrating Line Notify Personal Notification Service to the Also Free and More Powerful Telegram Bot
translations.搜尋你的機器人帳號＆點擊加入\n: Search for your bot account & click Join
Excerpted from [Line Notify official website](https://notify-bot.line.me/closing-announce){:target="_blank"}, Line announced on 2024/10/08 that Line Notify will be completely shut down on 2025/04/01. To continue using Line for message notifications, only the paid [Message API](https://developers.line.biz/en/services/messaging-api/){:target="_blank"} is available.
translations.新增部署作業，選擇「授予存取權」\n: Add a new deployment task and select "Grant access"
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本文也是我 Medium 的第 100 篇文章(2018/10 發表 [第一篇]: This is also my 100th article on Medium (first one published in 2018/10 [here](../b7a3fb3d5531/), six years ago). I will keep persevering and working hard. I’ll share detailed insights and data once I reach 1000 followers (currently 925 as of 2024/10) or a total of 1,000,000 views (currently 984,549 as of 2024/10).
translations.比 Line Notify 更棒的事是我們還可以對不同的 Group 設定不同的: Even better than Line Notify, we can set different notification sounds or mute settings for different groups.
translations.照前面 Telegram Bot 設定步驟取得的資訊。\n\n: Information obtained from the previous Telegram Bot setup steps.
translations.發送成功取得以上 Response\n: Message sent successfully, received the above response
translations.目前無任何功能，可以點右上角 Info，編輯名稱或上傳大頭貼。\n\n: Currently, there are no features available. You can tap the Info button at the top right to edit the name or upload a profile picture.

translations.隨著 Line Notify 宣告終止，正好也給我了一個遷移至其他通訊、通知服務: With Line Notify announcing its termination, it also gave me an opportunity to migrate to other communication and notification services:
translations.驗證成功！ 當有人按我的 Repo Star 時能正確改發送通知到 Telegr: Verification successful! Notifications are correctly sent to the Telegram Group when someone stars my Repo! 🎉🎉🎉
translations.點擊 4. 取得的 Bot 連結，開始使用 Bot：\n\n: Click the Bot link obtained in step 4 to start using the Bot:
